subcodes.first_line: Thy flowing poem hath become the cause of joy and gladness to hearts, and were especially presented at the Most Holy Court [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اشعار آبدار شما سبب فرح و بهجت قلوب گردید و مخصوص در ساحت اقدس عرض شد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @living waters; water of life
